titleStmt.title: SII 16.302: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswami and G. S. Gai
No. 302. (A.R. No. 299 of 1926.) MADHURĀPURAM, DHARMAVARAM TALUK, ANANTAPUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a slab lying in front of the Chennakēsava temple at Madhurāpuram, a depopulated hamlet of Daṁpeṭla.
This is dated Śaka 1512, Vikṛiti, Āshāḍha ba. 30, Solar eclipse corresponding to 1590 A.D., July 21, (Tuesday).

The inscription records that when the king was ruling from Penugoṇḍa, Nallaranēni Chimnapa, the servant of Mahānāyaṁkāchārya Pōtaṁ Yara-Kadirināyani-Kōnapa-nāyaka restored the incomes in cash and grain from certain lands in Dēvarapalle which were misappropriated by Hāṇḍe Dēvināyuḍu when he was ruling over Dampeṭla, to god Chennakēśava Aḷagha-Perumāḷ at Madhurāpuram for the merit of his master and the king.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu svastiśrī jayābhyudaya śāli
vāhana śakavarṣaṁbulu 1512 Agunēṭi vikṛti saṁva
tsara Āṣāḍha ba 30 lu śrī Akhilāṁḍakōṭibrahmāṁḍanāya
ka dēvadēvōttamulaina śrī madhurāpuraṁ śrīceṁnnakēśvaraAḷagha
perumāḷa divyaśrīpādāraviṁdaṁbulaku daṁḍamulu samarpiṁ
ci śrīmadrājādhirāja rājaparamēśvara śrīvīrapratāpa śrīveṁ
(ṁ)kaṭapatirāyadēvamahārāyalugāru penugoṁḍapaṭṭa
ṇamaṁdu ratnasiṁhāsanārūḍhuḍai pṛthvīsāmrājyamu cēyu
cuṁḍḍagānu śrīmaṁnmahānāyaṁkacāryyulaina raṇavīraghaṁṭa
pōtaṁ yarakadirināyani kōnapanāyanigāri baṁṭu nallaranēni
ciṁnapa Anaṁtamulaina daṁḍamulu samarpiṁcci[Iccina*] sarvamānyapu dha
rmasilāśāsanaṁ . svāmivāriki cellē dēvarapalle cēlu ceravukāluva
lu mērakugānu daṁpeṭla yēlipōIna haṁḍēdēvināyaḍu svāmi
vāri polānaku Anyāyaṁ cēsi Ēḍokaṁṭki śrōtriya rokhaṁ .
divara varahāluṁnnu jonalu puṭṭeḍuṁnu vaḍlu puṭṭeḍuṁnu svāmivā
ricāta puccukoṁcu vacciri ganka Ā rokhadhānyālu svāmivāri
pūjalakuṁnnu dīpārādhanakuṁnu yī sūryagrahaṇapu
ṇyakālamaṁdu tamaku daṁpeṭlagrāma pāliṁccina rāyala
vāriki puṁṇyaṁgānu tama yēlika kōnapanāyaniki puṁṇyaṁgānu sama
rpiṁciri Ācaṁdrārkamugā cellavalenani veyiṁccina dharmasilāśāsanaṁ
yī dharmmānaku reḍikaraṇālu mōdalaina daṁpeṭla yēlē rājyaṁ
vāru ganaka tappi svāmivāri soṁmmuku Apēkṣiṁccinaṣuvaṁṭi vā
ru tamatallidaṁḍrādula vāraṇāsilō vadhiyiṁcina pāpāna bōdu
ru gaṁgalō gōbrāṁhmaṇula vadhiyiṁccina pāpāna poduru śuṇakamāsyaṁ su
rā śēviṁcina pāpāna poduru . svadattā dviguṇaṁ puṇyaṁ paradattānu
pālanaṁ . paradattāpahārēṇa svadattaṁ niṣphalaṁ bhavēt .

svadattaṁ paradattaṁ vā yō
harēta vasuṁdharāṁ . ṣaṣṭhirva
ruṣa sahasrāṇi viṣṭhāyāṁ
jāyatē krimiḥ . dāna pālana
yōrmadhyē dānācchrēyō
nupālanaṁ dānātsvargga
Digital edition of SII 16.302 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
